summary: Completed testing of Chauffeur Portal with Tours functionality and Facture generation with barèmes kilométriques. Found and fixed 2 bugs: 1) Frontend was sending 'distance' instead of 'distance_km' to backend, 2) Backend facture generation was reading 'distance' instead of 'distance_km' from tours. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass - chauffeur portal allows adding tours with volume and distance, displays totals correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chauffeur/login with valid code 43FC7D returns chauffeur session
Backend: POST /api/chauffeur/login with invalid code returns 401
Backend: POST /api/pointages accepts tours array with volume and distance_km
Backend: POST /api/pointages calculates total_volume correctly (46.0 from 3 tours)
Backend: POST /api/pointages calculates total_distance correctly (35.5 km from 3 tours)
Backend: POST /api/pointages calculates nombre_tours correctly (3)
Backend: GET /api/config/baremes returns barèmes configuration with all 4 types
Backend: PUT /api/config/baremes/{type} updates barème tranches
Backend: POST /api/factures/generer creates facture from pointages
Backend: POST /api/factures/generer uses barèmes kilométriques for pricing
Backend: Facture model supports contrat_numero field for CCPA link
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa returns list of CCPA contracts
Frontend: Chauffeur Portal login page displays correctly
Frontend: Login with code EE81FC (Lorenzo GOHIER) works
Frontend: Chantier selection dropdown works
Frontend: 'Ajouter un tour' button appears after selecting chantier
Frontend: Tour inputs (volume, distance) appear when adding tour
Frontend: Multiple tours can be added
Frontend: Totals (volume, distance, tours count) display correctly
Frontend: Submit pointage saves data and shows success toast
Frontend: Pointage appears in 'Mes derniers pointages' history
Frontend: Factures page displays facture details with lignes
Frontend: Factures page shows Contrat CCPA section when contrat_numero exists

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend was sending 'distance' field but backend expects 'distance_km'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed tours mapping to use 'distance_km' instead of 'distance'

bugs_fixed.issue: Facture generation was reading tour.get('distance', 0) but field is stored as 'distance_km'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to tour.get('distance_km', 0) in facture generation logic

seed_data_creation: Used existing chauffeur Lorenzo GOHIER (code: EE81FC) with assigned chantier CH-2026-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chauffeur Portal with Tours functionality is fully working. The portal allows chauffeurs to login with access code, select a chantier, add multiple tours with volume and distance, and submit pointages. The totals are calculated and displayed correctly. Facture generation uses barèmes kilométriques and applies minima horaire rule. Contrat CCPA link is displayed in facture detail when available.

contrat_ccpa_link.display_in_ui: Shown in facture detail when available
